name: Skeleton
description: A skeleton placeholder component for indicating loading content with animated pulse effect.
usage_guidelines: Use as placeholder while content is loading.
Match skeleton dimensions to actual content for smooth transition.
Use 'block' variant for rectangular content areas.
Use 'circle' variant for avatars or circular elements.
Enable animation for better loading feedback.

styling_info.visual_description: A gray placeholder with optional pulse animation. Block variant is rectangular, circle variant is circular. Smooth transition when replaced with actual content.

Do: Match skeleton size to actual content
Use multiple skeletons for complex layouts
Dont: Don't use for very short loading times
Don't mismatch skeleton and content dimensions
Don't forget to remove when content loads
